channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Fed Officials Warn AI's Economic Costs May Come Faster Than Benefits
item.description: Do not expect AI to solve America's inflation problem, say several Federal Reserve officials who caution that the promise of an AI-driven economy may take time to materialize.

item.title: Trump plans to drop controversial fund
item.description: The Trump administration intends to abandon its $1.8 billion fund aimed at compensating alleged victims of prosecution.

item.title: Trump reins in Netanyahu on Lebanon after Iran threat
item.description: President Trump halted Israeli plans to bomb Hezbollah in Beirut after Iran threatened to quit negotiations.

item.title: The Rattled Generation: A unified theory of this moment
item.description: After extensive interviews with leaders and citizens, this is our analysis of the current state of America.
